questions.question: Explain the distributional hypothesis and its importance in word embeddings.
expectedPoints: Words in similar contexts have similar meanings
Enables automatic feature learning from context

questions.question: Compare and contrast the CBOW and Skip-gram architectures in word2vec, including their advantages and typical use cases.
expectedPoints: CBOW uses context to predict center word
Skip-gram uses center word to predict context
CBOW is faster and better for frequent words
Skip-gram better for rare words and larger contexts
CBOW uses context information more efficiently
Skip-gram needs more data but captures finer relationships
